definition: solid cylinder of finite height defined by an axis point at the centre of one planar circular face, an axis, a height, and the radius of the circular faces

definition_ml.en: solid cylinder of finite height defined by an axis point at the centre of one planar circular face, an axis, a height, and the radius of the circular faces

note: NOTE 1  The location of the cylinder is a point on the axis of the cylinder and at the centre of one of the planar circular faces.||NOTE 2  The axis of the cylinder has the direction of the central axis of symmetry of the cylinder.||NOTE 3  The property axis1_placement3d specifies the local coordinate system of the right circular cylinder whereas the property location specifies the position of the origin of the local coordinate system within the geometric context.

note_ml.en: NOTE 1  The location of the cylinder is a point on the axis of the cylinder and at the centre of one of the planar circular faces.||NOTE 2  The axis of the cylinder has the direction of the central axis of symmetry of the cylinder.||NOTE 3  The property axis1_placement3d specifies the local coordinate system of the right circular cylinder whereas the property location specifies the position of the origin of the local coordinate system within the geometric context.
